channel.title: Current Issue of the Texas Register
channel.description: This feed contains information published in the weekly Texas Register for May 29, 2026 in html and pdf format.

item.title: HTML format
item.description: Texas Register issue for May 29, 2026 in html format

item.title: PDF format
item.description: Texas Register issue for May 29, 2026 in pdf format

item.title: All Texas Register issues available electronically
item.description: All Texas Register issues beginning with Volume 1, Number 1 (January 6, 1976) are available through The Portal to Texas History on the University of North Texas Libraries website
